name: P90 | 珊瑚挽歌
descriptionEn: Easily recognizable for its unique bullpup design, the P90 is a great weapon to shoot on the move due to its high-capacity magazine and low recoil. A green and blue coral pattern has been applied. Nature laughed, for it created something we couldn't dream possible
descriptionZh: 因其独特的无托设计而更加容易辨认，多亏了 P90 高容量的弹匣和低后坐力，这把武器非常适合边移动边射击。 它采用了蓝绿珊瑚纹涂装。 自然嗤笑，因其造物远超人类想象
